PENGFUNAILONGMOD-NAILONG_BELLY.title: Nailong Belly
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-NAILONG_BELLY.descripti: The first time each turn you enter an expression, gain 3 [gold]Block[/gold].
The first time each turn you enter an expression, gain 3 [gold]Block[/gold].
The first time each combat you enter each expression, gain 1 Energy.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-BELLY_AMULET.title: Belly Amulet
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-BELLY_AMULET.descriptio: The first time each combat you take unblocked attack damage, gain 8 [gold]Block[/gold] and enter [gold]Fright[/gold].
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-CHAOS_BUTTON.title: Chaos Button
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-CHAOS_BUTTON.descriptio: The first time each combat you randomly enter an expression, randomly enter a basic expression again and gain 1 Energy.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-REVERSE_STICKER.title: Reverse Sticker
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-REVERSE_STICKER.descrip: The first time each turn you play a card weakened by your current expression, ignore that penalty.
